blocks.text: This slice moves the Codex adapter.

items: Public CI for command construction, blocked protocol args, unsafe bypass filtering, `CODEX_HOME` non-materialization, detection, JSONL parsing, raw translation, golden fixtures, JSON-RPC actor, handshake, and protocol-driver approval response

blocks.text: The package owns only the daemon-side C4 adapter ACL for the external Codex CLI app-server stdio mode. It must not bundle, install, or distribute Codex.
Real CLI integration is opt-in with `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1`; public CI stays deterministic and skips real CLI checks when the external CLI is absent.
